videoSnippet.title: A Beautiful Game To Improve Your Day || Deac vs Giri || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Deac, Bogdan-Daniel (2650) - Giri, Anish (2767)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.05.22
E15 Queen's Indian, Nimzovich variation (exaggerated fianchetto)

1.d4 e6 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.c4 b6 4.g3 Ba6 5.b3 Bb4+ 6.Bd2 Be7 7.Nc3 d5 8.cxd5 exd5 9.Bg2 O-O 10.O-O Nbd7 11.Rc1 Ba3 12.Rc2 Re8 13.Re1 Rc8 14.Bc1 Bf8 15.Bb2 c6 16.Qc1 Bb7 17.Rd1 a5 18.e3 Bd6 19.Nd2 Bb4 20.a3 Bxc3 21.Bxc3 Qe7 22.Nf3 Ne4 23.Qb2 Qe6 24.a4 Ba6 25.Be1 h5 26.h4 Qf5 27.Rcc1 Rc7 28.Qc2 Qe6 29.b4 axb4 30.Bxb4 Rcc8 31.Be1 c5 32.Qb2 c4 33.Bc3 Rcd8 34.Rb1 Bb7 35.Ne5 Nxe5 36.dxe5 Nc5 37.a5 bxa5 38.Qb5 d4 39.Rxd4 Rb8 40.e4 Nb3 41.Rd6 Qc8 42.e6 Rxe6 43.Qg5 f6 44.Bxf6 Rxf6 45.Rxf6 Qd8 46.e5 Bxg2 47.Kxg2 c3 48.Qg6 Qd5+ 49.Kh2 c2 50.Qxc2 gxf6 51.Qg6+ Kf8 52.exf6 Qf7 53.Qh6+ Ke8 54.Re1+ Kd8
